title: tagetes elliptica
intro: Tagetes elliptica, also known as Mexican marigold, is a perennial plant species native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, and is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tagetes elliptica include relieving digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, tinctures, and topical creams, making it a versatile and effective natural remedy.
